items.title: Livily Launches "Business Class Vacation Rentals," the First-Ever Vacation Rental Platform Integrated with Global Travel Management Systems
items.description: NEW YORK, NY / ACCESS Newswire / November 11, 2025 / Livily LLC a Livly Technologies Inc., company is a leading proptech and travel technology company, today announced the completion of its integrations with major Global Travel Management Systems ...

items.title: Dow rallies 300 points to new record with shutdown set to end Wednesday: Live updates
items.description: Tuesday saw a tale of two markets emerge — the 30-stock Dow rallied more than 550 points to close at a record high, while the Nasdaq Composite slipped.

items.title: Q3 Earnings: These Companies Posted Record Breaking Results
items.description: We continue to wade through the 2025 Q3 earnings cycle, which has been largely positive so far. Several companies, inlcuding these two, have posted results that shattered previous records.
